Poll.title: Poll
Poll.description: Representa una votación con preguntas, opciones y estado.

question.description: La pregunta presentada en la votación.

options.description: Opciones disponibles para la pregunta de la votación.

status.description: El estado de la votación (ej. abierta, cerrada).

pollType.description: El tipo de votación (simple o múltiple).

maxSelections.description: Número máximo de opciones que un votante puede seleccionar en una votación de opción múltiple.

groupId.description: El ID del grupo de votantes para el que es esta votación.

adminId.description: Referencia al Administrador que creó la votación. (Relación: Admin 1:N Votación)

createdAt.description: Marca de tiempo de cuándo se creó la votación.

Voter.title: Voter
Voter.description: Representa un votante registrado y su estado de voto para una votación específica.

id.description: Identificador único para el registro del votante.

pollId.description: Referencia a la Votación a la que este votante está asociado. (Relación: Votación 1:N Votante)

voterId.description: El identificador único de negocio para el votante.

hasVoted.description: Indica si el votante ya ha votado en la votación.

adminId.description: Referencia desnormalizada al Administrador que creó la votación.

Vote.title: Vote
Vote.description: Representa un voto anónimo emitido en una votación.

pollId.description: Referencia a la Votación a la que pertenece este voto. (Relación: Votación 1:N Voto)

selectedOptions.description: La(s) opción(es) seleccionada(s) por el votante.

isBombero.description: Flag to indicate if the admin is a firefighter to control UI.

VoterGroup.title: Voter Group
VoterGroup.description: Represents a reusable group of voters created by an admin.

id.description: Unique identifier for the voter group.

name.description: The name of the voter group.

adminId.description: The ID of the admin who owns this group.

voters.description: A list of voters in this group.

id.description: The unique identifier for the voter.

nombre.description: The first name of the voter.

apellido.description: The last name of the voter.

enabled.description: Indicates if the voter is active and can participate in polls.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the group was created.

PollLookup.title: Poll Lookup
PollLookup.description: Un documento de búsqueda para encontrar el adminId para un pollId dado.

adminId.description: The ID of the admin who created the poll.

AuthorizedAdmin.title: Authorized Admin
AuthorizedAdmin.description: Represents an email address that is authorized to be an administrator.

email.description: The email address of the authorized admin.

Sala.title: Sala
Sala.description: Represents a public room or space for voting, linked to an admin.

name.description: The public display name of the sala.

adminId.description: The UID of the admin who owns this sala.

ListaCompletaItem.title: Lista Completa Item
ListaCompletaItem.description: Represents a single person in the complete list of the company (martyrs, volunteers, etc.).

adminId.description: The ID of the admin who owns this item.

OrdenLista.title: Orden Lista
OrdenLista.description: Defines the display order and sorting method for a specific type of member.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ordering rule.

adminId.description: The ID of the admin who owns this rule.

tipo.description: The member type this rule applies to (e.g., 'Bombero').

orden.description: The numerical order for display, lower numbers first.

metodo.description: The sorting method for members within this type.

PollTemplate.title: Poll Template
PollTemplate.description: Representa una plantilla reutilizable para una votación estándar.

adminId.description: The ID of the admin who owns this template.

name.description: El nombre o título de la plantilla de votación.

maxSelections.description: Selecciones máximas para una votación de opción múltiple.

definition.description: Subcolección para almacenar las votaciones creadas por cada administrador. Incluye 'adminId' desnormalizado para independencia de autorización.
Subcolección para almacenar votantes registrados para una votación específica. Incluye 'pollId' y 'adminId' desnormalizados para consultas seguras.
Subcolección para almacenar votos anónimos emitidos en una votación específica. Incluye 'pollId' desnormalizado para independencia de autorización.
Subcollection to store reusable voter groups created by each admin.

params.name: groupId
params.description: Unique identifier for the voter group.

definition.description: Subcollection for all company members (martyrs, volunteers, etc.).

params.name: itemId
params.description: Unique ID for the list item.

definition.description: Subcollection to store the display order rules for member types.

params.name: ordenId
params.description: Unique ID for the ordering rule.

params.name: templateId
params.description: Unique ID for the poll template.

definition.description: Una tabla de búsqueda pública para encontrar el administrador propietario de una votación.
A whitelist collection of emails for users who are permitted to be administrators. This list should be managed from the Firebase Console.

params.name: authId
params.description: Unique identifier for the authorized email document.

definition.description: A public collection mapping friendly names to admin IDs for the voter inbox.

params.name: salaId
params.description: Unique identifier for the sala document.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to ensure authorization independence, clarity, and scalability, adhering to the principles of DBAC (Database-Based Access Control) and QAPs (Rules are not Filters).  It leverages denormalization to avoid `get()` calls in security rules, enabling atomic operations and simplifying debugging.

**Authorization Independence:**

*   `Polls`: The `adminId` field within each poll document directly associates the poll with its creator, eliminating the need to fetch admin data during authorization.
*   `Voters`: The `pollId` and `adminId` fields within each voter document link the voter to a specific poll and its owner. This design enables efficient, secure collection group queries for the voter inbox feature and maintains authorization independence.
*   `VoterGroups`: Are stored under the admin who created them, ensuring strict ownership and simple security rules.

**Structural Segregation:**

*   The database separates polls, voters, votes, and groups into distinct collections. This segregation allows for specific and straightforward security rules for each entity.

**Access Modeling:**

*   **Path-Based Ownership:** Polls and Groups are accessed via `/admins/{adminId}/...`, making ownership clear and security rules simple.
*   **One-to-Many Relationship:** The structure reflects the one-to-many relationships between Admins and Polls, Admins and VoterGroups, Polls and Voters, and Polls and Votes through hierarchical paths.

**QAPs Support:**

*   The structure enables secure `list` operations because access control is enforced at the collection level (e.g., only the admin can list polls/groups under their ID).

**Invariants:**

*   The structure supports the integrity of ownership, timestamps, and denormalized data. For example, `adminId` maintains clear ownership.
